annual_rate.notes: Post-judgment interest under W. Va. Code § 56-6-31, currently 6.25% (as of January 1, 2026). 2 percentage points above the Fifth Federal Reserve District SECONDARY DISCOUNT rate in effect on January 2 of the year the judgment/decree is entered, with a statutory floor… Simple interest. Formula and rate apply to both (unified by 2017 amendment eff. Jan 1, 2018) — pre-judgment keyed to the rate on Jan 2 of the year the CAUSE OF ACTION… Verify the current value at courtswv.gov; not legal advice.

Post-judgment interest under W. Va. Code § 56-6-31, currently 6.25% (as of January 1, 2026). 2 percentage points above the Fifth Federal Reserve District SECONDARY DISCOUNT rate in effect on January 2 of the year the judgment/decree is entered, with a statutory floor… Simple interest. Formula and rate apply to both (unified by 2017 amendment eff. Jan 1, 2018) — pre-judgment keyed to the rate on Jan 2 of the year the CAUSE OF ACTION… Verify the current value at courtswv.gov; not legal advice.
